case_title: DANIEL G. ELGHOUSAEN VS. VALERIA ROSSI

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELGHOUSAEN, DANIEL G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSSI, VALERIA $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,890.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSI, VALERIA HEARING SET FOR MAY-06-2021 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR DANIEL ELGHOUSAEN IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR VALERIA ROSSI IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED DEC-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSI, VALERIA
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ELGHOUSAEN, DANIEL G.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-17-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DANIEL G. ELGHOUSAEN. DEFENDANT VALERIA ROSSI DID NOT APPEAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. PLAINTIFF ADAMANT THAT DEFENDANT WAS SERVED, HE JUST DIDN'T FILE IT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-19-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506, APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DANIEL G. ELGHOUSAEN. DEFENDANT VALERIA ROSSI DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY ELGHOUSAEN, DANIEL G. AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSI, VALERIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-19-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DANIEL ELGHOUSAEN. DEFENDANT VALERIA ROSSI DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER TO DISCHARGE OF ORDER OF EXAMINATION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/26/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
